no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction.md explicitly states implementation details: 'must use a signed integer type for deserialization', 'error messages should reference file descriptor not resource id', 'capture its own stdout/stderr handles during initialization', specific files and what to change in each. This goes beyond describing what's broken and prescribes much of the solution approach.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert gold-specific names: 'StdioOrFd' (not e.g. 'StdioOrFileDescriptor'), 'Fd(i32)' variant (not 'FileDescriptor(i32)'), 'ChildProcessStdio' struct name, exact string 'borrow::<ChildProcessStdio>', exact import path 'use deno_io::ChildProcessStdio'. A correct alternative using different naming would fail these tests.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: The fail-to-pass tests (test_stdio_or_fd_enum through test_numeric_fd_deserialization) are ALL text-matching tests using regex/string search on source files (e.g., `re.search(r'pub\s+enum\s+StdioOrFd', content)`). None of them execute the code, spawn processes, or test runtime behavior. The pass-to-pass repo_tests do run cargo check/test/clippy, but every f2p test is pure text inspection.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub implementation that simply renames the enum to StdioOrFd with an Fd(i32) variant, adds the ChildProcessStdio struct with pub stdout/stderr fields, adds the right imports and string literals, without actually implementing correct fd passing behavior, would pass all f2p tests since they only check text patterns in source files.

behavior_in_tests.reason: The instruction requires numeric fd passthrough to actually work (child process writing to fd), and inherit mode with redirected output to function correctly. No test actually spawns a child process with a numeric fd or verifies redirected output inheritance — only source text patterns are checked.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are well-grouped with section comments (fail-to-pass pr_diff, pass-to-pass static, pass-to-pass repo_tests), have descriptive names and docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task does not produce structured data like JSON/CSV/API/DB output.

no_typos.reason: No typos detected in filenames, paths, commands, or variable names across instruction.md and test files.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction.md explicitly names exact files (ext/process/lib.rs, ext/io/lib.rs, ext/node/polyfills/internal/child_process.ts) and describes specific changes needed in each, including 'signed integer type for deserialization', 'ChildStdio struct fields must still be typed with a stdio option type', and 'capture its own stdout/stderr handles during initialization'.
